hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | jq -e .stop_hook_active >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; STATUS_FILE="research/Order-Intake-Sprint-Status.md"; [ -f "$STATUS_FILE" ] || exit 0; FILE_MTIME=$(stat -c %Y "$STATUS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m "$STATUS_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); LAST_COMMIT_TIME=$(git log -1 --format=%ct HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$LAST_COMMIT_TIME" -gt "$FILE_MTIME" ]; then jq -n '{decision:"block",reason:"research/Order-Intake-Sprint-Status.md is stale relative to git HEAD. Run git log --oneline since the status file last changed, update the status table + one-line summary + Built/Missing inventories to reflect new commits, then stop."}'; fi
